---
title: "#bioc-conference-noncompeting"
format: gfm
---

## 2019-10-11

**Charlotte Soneson** (07:45:13):
> @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel

**Charlotte Soneson** (07:45:14):
> set the channel description: Plan the “non-competing components” part of the Bioc conference

**Lori Shepherd** (07:46:48):
> @Lori Shepherd has joined the channel

**Qian Liu** (07:46:48):
> @Qian Liu has joined the channel

**Fred Boehm** (07:46:48):
> @Fred Boehm has joined the channel

**Simina Boca** (07:46:48):
> @Simina Boca has joined the channel

**Lauren Hsu** (07:46:48):
> @Lauren Hsu has joined the channel

**Deepak Tanwar** (07:46:49):
> @Deepak Tanwar has joined the channel

**Helena L. Crowell** (07:46:49):
> @Helena L. Crowell has joined the channel

**Mikhail Dozmorov** (07:46:49):
> @Mikhail Dozmorov has joined the channel

**Chiaowen Joyce Hsiao** (07:46:49):
> @Chiaowen Joyce Hsiao has joined the channel

**Martin Morgan** (07:46:49):
> @Martin Morgan has joined the channel

**Levi Waldron** (07:46:49):
> @Levi Waldron has joined the channel

**Rafael Irizarry** (07:46:50):
> @Rafael Irizarry has joined the channel

**Lorena Pantano** (07:46:50):
> @Lorena Pantano has joined the channel

**Aedin Culhane** (07:46:50):
> @Aedin Culhane has joined the channel

**Simone Bell** (07:46:50):
> @Simone Bell has joined the channel

**Charlotte Soneson** (07:53:03):
> :wave:Hi all, and thanks for volunteering to engage in planning the non-competing activities of Bioc2020! Simone and I are preparing a Google Doc with some initial suggestions, to help structure and get the discussions going. We will share it in this channel shortly.


## 2019-10-16

**Charlotte Soneson** (12:39:53):
> Hi all - as promised, here’s the link to the Google Doc. It contains what was discussed during the last call, and some additional structure and ideas. Please add suggestions for the keynote speaker in the Google Doc so that we keep track of things - general discussions can of course be kept here in the channel. Also, please feel free to add additional suggestions for activities, and/or volunteer to lead/contribute to one of the suggested ones![https://docs.google.com/document/d/11eQGh1Z_X3Hbcxxczq6KppzTkVH-ZVT1ZGKqcL7lAtU/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11eQGh1Z_X3Hbcxxczq6KppzTkVH-ZVT1ZGKqcL7lAtU/edit?usp=sharing)

**Martin Morgan** (12:57:30) (in thread):
> @Charlotte Sonesonfollowing the link tells me 'access denied'?

**Charlotte Soneson** (12:59:20) (in thread):
> Oh, thanks for letting me know. I think it may be because Simone generated it, and perhaps only people within EMBL can actually invite more people… Will fix!


## 2019-10-17

**Charlotte Soneson** (03:27:10) (in thread):
> It should be fixed now


## 2019-10-21

**Aedin Culhane** (13:43:06) (in thread):
> I can access now.

**Aedin Culhane** (13:44:03) (in thread):
> May I suggest making a table (speak name, affiliation, url to their website, why they'd be a great speaker).. so its easier for others to evaluate which speaker(s) to invite

**Charlotte Soneson** (13:58:16) (in thread):
> Yes, good point. I’ll try to make a table in the Google Doc (seems easier than having yet another Google Sheet to keep track of)

**Charlotte Soneson** (14:34:38):
> :wave:Hi all - please add any suggestions for community day keynote speakers to the table in the Google Doc above! I was hoping that we could have a good list by the end of the month, to leave some time to vote and have a suggestion by the next group call.


## 2019-10-22

**Aedin Culhane** (10:25:45) (in thread):
> Thanks. It’s helps to have affiliation and url just in case two people have same/similar names


## 2019-10-30

**Charlotte Soneson** (11:15:14):
> Final nudge:slightly_smiling_face:please put any additional keynote speaker suggestions in the Google Doc before tomorrow mid-day European time - after that I’ll organize the voting and we’ll hopefully have a ranked list of speakers for the next group call.


## 2019-10-31

**Charlotte Soneson** (08:31:12):
> Time to vote! Thanks to everyone for the speaker suggestions - I have prepared a Doodle with the suggested names (see the Google Doc above for more information about the respective speakers) here:[https://doodle.com/poll/a9mt47z7z8d4cdeu](https://doodle.com/poll/a9mt47z7z8d4cdeu). I suggest that everyone can place a vote on up to three of these suggestions; we will then summarize the votes and report back here on Tuesday morning before the group call. Thank you!
  - Attachment (doodle.com): [Doodle: Keynote speaker, Bioc 2020 community day](https://doodle.com/poll/a9mt47z7z8d4cdeu)
> Please vote for up to three speakers that you would be interested in seeing at the Bioc developer-community day 2020. For more information about the speakers, refer to the Bioc2020 developer-community day Google Doc.

**Charlotte Soneson** (09:45:40):
> Hi again...only after putting up the doodle I realized that the gender balance of the final set of suggestions was worse than intended. I think this was rather coincidental than really reflecting the community, and I have therefore taken the liberty to increase the pool of candidates a little bit. Sorry for not realizing earlier, and apologies specifically to the person who already voted - feel free to update the selection if you would like.

**Qian Liu** (10:28:42):
> @Charlotte SonesonThanks for putting these together! The newly added female scientists are awesome. Voted!


## 2019-11-04

**Charlotte Soneson** (08:10:48):
> Quick reminder that if you want to have a say in the keynote speaker selection for the community day, be sure to place your vote in the doodle above***today***(or, at the latest, before noon tomorrow European time).


## 2019-11-05

**Kevin Blighe** (21:36:12):
> @Kevin Blighe has joined the channel


## 2019-11-21

**Stephany Orjuela** (10:33:56):
> @Stephany Orjuela has joined the channel

**Stephany Orjuela** (10:34:48):
> @Stephany Orjuela has left the channel


## 2019-12-03

**Frederick Tan** (15:29:16):
> @Frederick Tan has joined the channel


## 2019-12-10

**Almut** (12:14:50):
> @Almut has joined the channel


## 2020-02-05

**Aedin Culhane** (12:36:04):
> @Charlotte Soneson@Simina BocaIt might be worth chatting with Gabriela de Queiroz to see if she has suggestion for community day group activities. She may have some fun ideas

**Aedin Culhane** (12:36:18):
> She is active on twitter and responds to DM

**Charlotte Soneson** (12:41:07):
> :+1:Yep, was thinking of that. We’ll try to initiate a list of concrete ideas this week.


## 2020-02-10

**Simone Bell** (11:42:53):
> Hi all, thanks for your contributions so far. The programme for day 1 is taking shape and we would like to ask for ideas/comments and volunteers for this day once again. You are welcome to contribute directly to the Google Doc for the non-competing programme. Thank you!


## 2020-07-24

**Levi Waldron** (04:26:03):
> set the channel topic: Planning for the “non-competing components” part of the Bioc conference. For general conference discussion during the conference use #bioc2020 and for workshop-specific discussion use #bioc2020-workshops.


## 2020-08-19

**Adrija Kalvisa** (04:32:26):
> @Adrija Kalvisa has joined the channel


## 2020-12-02

**Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles)** (05:42:10):
> @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has joined the channel


## 2020-12-14

**Nick Owen** (13:20:55):
> @Nick Owen has joined the channel


## 2021-01-22

**Annajiat Alim Rasel** (15:41:18):
> @Annajiat Alim Rasel has joined the channel


## 2021-05-11

**Megha Lal** (16:43:48):
> @Megha Lal has joined the channel


## 2022-01-28

**Megha Lal** (11:11:51):
> @Megha Lal has left the channel


## 2023-01-18

**José Basílio** (13:08:58):
> @José Basílio has joined the channel


## 2023-06-02

**Simone Bell** (08:23:11):
> @Simone Bell has left the channel


## 2023-11-21

**Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles)** (05:40:13):
> @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has left the channel


## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (09:43:17):
> archived the channel
